code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut total = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut done = false
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not done
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
      end
    else
      if has_digit and not done
        if total + current <= 100
          total = total + current
        else
          done = true
        end
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("total=#{total}")
end
